opportunities.jtbd: When I use a banking app, I want to have a seamless and easy experience, so I can manage my finances with confidence.

assumptions.text: Users are frustrated with the complexity of the app and would engage more if it were easier to use.
Users feel informed and in control when they receive timely and relevant updates about their account activity.
Users appreciate helpful and responsive support, which builds trust and loyalty in the app.

opportunities.jtbd: When I need to send money internationally, I want to have a smooth and reliable experience, so I can trust that my transactions will be processed efficiently.

assumptions.text: Users are frustrated with the current process and would appreciate a more straightforward and efficient experience.

solutions.label: Provide clear and timely updates on transfer status

assumptions.text: Users want to stay informed about the status of their transactions and appreciate transparency and communication from the app.

solutions.label: Offer multilingual support for international users

assumptions.text: Users who speak different languages may face barriers in using the app and would benefit from support in their native language.

opportunities.jtbd: When I encounter issues with my account, I want to receive prompt and helpful support, so I can resolve the problem quickly and get back to using the app with confidence.

solutions.label: Implement a more responsive and empathetic support system

assumptions.text: Users feel frustrated and abandoned when they don't receive timely and helpful support, which erodes trust in the app.

solutions.label: Provide clear and concise communication about account issues and resolutions

assumptions.text: Users appreciate transparency and clear explanations when issues arise and are resolved, which helps to build trust and confidence in the app.

solutions.label: Offer proactive measures to prevent account issues and errors

assumptions.text: Users would appreciate measures that prevent issues from arising in the first place, such as robust security measures and clear guidelines for using the app.
